_comment: File routing config for CLS v3 Phase 2 AWS Downloader. To add a new format: add one entry. collection = Iconik sub-collection name. action = localize_a9 (sent to A9 agent) | download_only (stored as-is, manual treatment). agent = which agent handles it (null if download_only).

fallback._note: Unknown extension → store in external_files without processing, flag for manual review
